category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden electric and cordless power tools, plus their chargers, AC adaptors, and lithium battery packs, exported from China to Japan.

title.en: China-to-Japan Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入日本：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入日本：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Japan's DENAN/PSE electrical safety, VCCI EMC, radio (Giteki), J-Moss substance marking, occupational-noise context, and battery requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与日本 DENAN/PSE 电气安全、VCCI 电磁兼容、无线（技适）、J-Moss 物质标识、职业噪声背景及电池要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與日本 DENAN/PSE 電氣安全、VCCI 電磁相容、無線（技適）、J-Moss 物質標識、職業噪聲背景及電池要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Japanese law (DENAN), JIS standards, VCCI rules, radio Giteki obligations, J-Moss marking, and enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行日本法律（电安法）、JIS 标准、VCCI 规则、无线技适义务、J-Moss 标识及执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行日本法律（電安法）、JIS 標準、VCCI 規則、無線技適義務、J-Moss 標識及執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Japan, the mandatory baseline is DENAN (Electrical Appliances and Materials Safety Act) PSE conformity for in-scope corded tools and AC chargers/adaptors, with a Japan-resident business notifier; JIS C 62841 (= IEC 62841) is the common safety route, VCCI covers EMC, and Japan has no EU-style mandatory outdoor product-noise marking. Cordless lithium packs follow Japan's battery and DENAN rules.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入日本，强制基线是对适用的有线工具和交流充电器/适配器完成 DENAN（电气用品安全法）PSE 符合性，并设有日本境内事业届出主体；JIS C 62841（= IEC 62841）是常用安全路径，VCCI 覆盖电磁兼容，且日本没有欧盟式强制户外产品噪声标识。无绳锂电池包遵循日本电池及 DENAN 规则。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入日本，強制基線是對適用的有線工具和交流充電器/適配器完成 DENAN（電氣用品安全法）PSE 符合性，並設有日本境內事業屆出主體；JIS C 62841（= IEC 62841）是常用安全路徑，VCCI 覆蓋電磁相容，且日本沒有歐盟式強制戶外產品噪聲標識。無繩鋰電池包遵循日本電池及 DENAN 規則。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal source preferred.
